description_long: This church features a rectangular nave with a steeply pitched, orange-brown roof and a prominent, tall bell tower at one end. The bell tower is accented with vertical, translucent blue-green panels and capped with a pointed spire. The main body of the church is adorned with arched windows framed in dark gray, set into light gray walls with decorative pilasters. The base of the building is robust, with a series of buttress-like supports along the sides. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with a focus on verticality and clean lines. The structure is likely constructed from stone or concrete, with glass elements in the tower and windows.
description: A light gray church with a tall bell tower, orange-brown roof, and arched windows, accented by blue-green vertical panels and a pointed spire.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long nave, three arched windows, and the attached bell tower with blue-green panels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed spire, vertical blue-green panels, and the narrow facade of the bell tower.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the nave, arched windows, and bell tower visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the nave with no windows and the base of the bell tower.
